name: data-grid-keyboard-shortcuts
title: Data Grid Keyboard Shortcuts
description: A keyboard shortcuts dialog component for the data grid.

files.content:
{#snippet child({ props })} {/snippet} Keyboard shortcuts Use these keyboard shortcuts to navigate and interact with the data grid more efficiently.
{#if filteredGroups.length === 0}
No shortcuts found

Try searching for a different term.

{:else}
{#each filteredGroups as shortcutGroup (shortcutGroup.title)}

{shortcutGroup.title}

{#each shortcutGroup.shortcuts as shortcut, index (index)}
{shortcut.description} {#each shortcut.keys as key, keyIndex (key)} {#if keyIndex > 0} + {/if} {key} {/each}
{/each}
{/each}
{/if}
